Workspace Tips & Advice

Practical, actionable tips to improve your home office setup and daily routine.

Browse our collection of workspace tips organized by category. Each tip is designed to be implemented quickly and make a tangible difference in your comfort, productivity, and health.

Organization

Keep your desk surface clutter‑free—use cable trays and drawer organizers.

Ergonomics

Position your monitor so the top is at or slightly below eye level to reduce neck strain.

Lighting

Use indirect lighting to reduce screen glare and eye fatigue. A desk lamp with adjustable brightness is ideal.

Productivity

Batch similar tasks together and use time‑blocking to maintain focus throughout the day.

Health

Take a 5‑minute break every hour to stand, stretch, and look away from your screen.

Cable Management

Use adhesive cable clips under your desk to keep wires organized and out of sight.

Mindset

Start each work session with a clear intention—write down the one thing you must accomplish.

Want a fresh tip every day? Check out the Tip of the Day on the homepage.

See Today's Tip
